_comment_1: Merge the mcpServers entry below into Claude Desktop's claude_desktop_config.json. Open it via Claude Desktop → Settings → Developer → Edit Config, or edit directly: macOS ~/Library/Application Support/Claude/, Windows %APPDATA%\Claude\, Linux ~/.config/Claude/.
_comment_2: REPLACE BOTH PLACEHOLDERS: '<container>' is what `docker ps` shows in the NAMES column. '/absolute/path/to/claude-bridge' is what `which claude-bridge` prints from INSIDE the container — typical values: /usr/local/bin/claude-bridge (system pip), /home/<user>/.local/bin/claude-bridge (pipx), <repo>/.venv/bin/claude-bridge (editable venv install).
_comment_3: Use the absolute path. `docker exec` does NOT activate venvs or source ~/.bashrc; the bare 'claude-bridge' name only works if the binary lives in a directory baked into the image's default PATH. After saving, fully quit and relaunch Claude Desktop — Cowork inherits servers from this file; there is no separate Cowork-only registration for local stdio.
